candidates.why: Direct total current assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for ACT.
Balancing/subtotal artifact, not preferred over the explicit reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Appears to be a variant/secondary cash line; less preferred than the main reported cash line.
Restricted and long-term cash should not be used for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the main balance sheet cash line, not restricted cash.

candidates.why: Direct total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; exact match for LCT.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/subtotal artifact, not preferred over the explicit reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing borrowings; excludes lease wording and appears to represent current debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Also semantically matches STD, but values are blank in the preview and may overlap with the current interest-bearing liabilities total if both are reported.
Current lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean current debt total. Did not include lease liabilities. Did not add 'Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases' to avoid potential double counting with the broader current interest-bearing liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct current tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet PPE line; best match for PPEGT.
Balancing value artifact and less clean than the explicit PPE line.
ROU assets are lease-related and separate from the standard PPE line.

variables.notes: Used the explicit PPE line rather than tangible-assets balancing items or right-of-use assets.

candidates.why: Direct total assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for AT.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities
candidates.why: Direct net cash flow from operating activities line; exact match for OANCF.
Only a component of operating cash flow, not the total OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the total operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
